title: Modern Legacy
description: A continuation of Programmer Art that incorporates Legacy Console features.
body:
Modern Legacy is a resource pack that intends to recreate the style of Legacy Console Edition. It also serves as a continuation of Programmer Art.

Key Features:
- Old Pre-1.14 Textures
- Fixed textures such as Nylium and Deepslate Ores to fit with the old textures.
- Xbox 360 title
- Other parity features

Intended to be used with the [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) mod.
